name: Agent-Commerce-OS-Catalog
description: The official MCP catalog for Sakutto Works. Provides zero-trust web data normalization tools for RAG pipelines.

authentication.instruction: Obtain your API Key from https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_mps3G1hmCTmQWDYYEMY2G1c7sojN3Tul6IhjO4EtVuj. Billed at $0.10 per successful normalization.

tools.name: normalize_web_data
tools.description: Extracts and normalizes unstructured web content (e.g., Japanese tech regulation sites, academic papers) into clean, agent-readable Markdown or JSON. Strips HTML noise and optimizes for RAG.

url.description: The target URL to extract data from.
